name: hero-fintech
description: A trust-forward fintech hero: reassuring copy on the left, a decorative account card with a tabular balance and a strip of encrypted-guarantee figures on the right. The neutrals carry the design; the single accent only underlines security. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Renders a single h1 for the headline and labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby
The account card, balance figure and guarantee strip are decorative (aria-hidden) and do not affect contrast of the text
CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a fintech or banking landing hero with a trust-building account card
a hero pairing reassuring copy with a card visual and security figures
examples: <HeroFintech eyebrow="FDIC insured" title="The bank that plays it straight" subtitle="Zero hidden fees, insured deposits, end-to-end encryption." primaryAction={{ label: 'Open an account', href: '/signup' }} secondaryAction={{ label: 'See pricing', href: '/pricing' }} assurance="Deposits insured up to $100,000" />
